title: Maa Yamuna Chalisa
intro: Shri Yamuna Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Yamuna
description:
|| Doha ||
Priyasanga krida karat nit, sukhanidhi ved ko saar.
Daras paras te paap mite, Shrikrishna pran aadhar.
Yamuna pavan vimal sujas, bhakti sakal ras khani.
Shesh Mahesh vadan karat, mahima na jay bakhani.
Pujit surasur Mukund priya, sevahi sakal nar-nar.
Prakati mukti hetu jag, sevahi utrahi paar.
Bandi charan kar jori kaho, suniyo matu pukar.
Bhakti charan chitt deyi ke, kijai bhav te paar.

|| Chaupai ||
Jai jai jai Yamuna maharani.
Jaya Kalindi Krishna patarani.
Rupa anup shobha chhavi nyari.
Madhav-priya Braj shobha bhari.
Bhuvan basi ghor tap kinha.
Purna manorath Murari kinha.
Nija ardhangi tumhi apnayo.
Sanvaro Shyam pati priya payo.
Rupa alaukik adbhut jyoti.
Neer renu damkat jyun moti.
Suryasuta shyamal sab anga.
Kotichandra dhyuti kanti abhanga.
Aashray Brajadhishwar linha.
Gokul basi shuchi bhaktan kinha.
Krishna Nand ghar Gokul ayo.
Charan vandi kari darshan payo.
Solah shringar bhuj kankan sohe.
Koti kaam lajahi mann mohen.
Krishnavesh nath moti rajat.
Nupur ghungharu charan mein bajat.
Mani manak mukta chhavi niki.
Mohani rupa sab upma fiki.
Mand chalahi priya-pritam pyari.
Rijhahi Shyam priya priya nihari.
Mohan bas kari hriday virajat.
Binu pritam kshan chain na pavat.
Muralidhar jab murali bajavain.
Sang keli kari anand pavain.
Mor hans kokil nit khelat.
Jalkhag kujat mridubani bolat.
Ja par kripa drishti barsavain.
Prem ko bhed sohi jan pavain.
Naam Yamuna jab mukh pe avain.
Sabahi amangal dekhi tari javain.
Bhaje naam Yamuna amrit ras.
Rahe sanvaro sada tahi bas.
Karunamayi sakal rasakhani.
Sur nar muni bandahi sab gyani.
Bhutal prakati avtar jab linha.
Uddhar sabhi bhaktan ko kinho.
Shesh gira shruti paar na pavat.
Yogi jati muni dhyan lagavat.
Dand pranam je achaman karahi.
Nasahi agh bhavsindhu tarahi.
Bhav bhakti se neer nahavain.
Dev sakal tehi bhagya saravain.
Kari Braj vas nirantar dhyavahi.
Paramanand param pad pavahi.
Sant munijan majjan karahi.
Nav bhaktiras nij ur bharahi.
Puja nem charan anuragi.
Hoi anugrah darash badbhagi.
Deepdan kari arti karahi.
Antar sukh mann nirmal rahahi.
Kirti vishad vinay kari gavat.
Siddhi alaukik bhakti pavat.
Bade prem ShriYamuna pad gavain.
Mohan sanmukh sunan ko avain.
Atur hoy sharanagat avain.
Kripakari tahi begi apnavain.
Mamatamayi sab janahi mann ki.
Bhav pida harahi nij jan ki.
Sharan patipal priya kunjeshwari.
Braj upma pritam praneshvari.
Shriji Yamuna kripa jab hoi.
Brahma sambandh jiv ko hoi.
Pushtimargi nit mahima gavain.
Krishna charan nit bhakti dridhavain.
Namo namo Shri Yamune maharani.
Namo namo Shripat patarani.
Namo namo Yamune sukh karni.
Namo namo Yamune dukh harni.
Namo Krishnayai sakal gunakhani.
Shriharipriya nikunj nivasini.
Karunamayi ab kripa kijain.
Fadkati mohi sharan me lijain.
Jo Yamuna chalisa nit gavain.
Kripa prasad te sab sukh pavain.
Gyan bhakti dhan kirti pavahi.
Ant samay Shridham te javahi.

|| Doha ||
Bhaj charan chit sukh karan, haran trividh bhav traas.
Bhakti pai anand raman, kripa drishti Braj vaas.
Yamuna chalisa nit nem te, path kare mann lay.
Krishna charan rati bhakti dridh, bhav badha mit jay.
meaning:
Yamuna Chalisa

|| Doha ||
Priyasanga krida karat nit, sukhanidhi ved ko saar.
You play eternally with your Beloved, and are the ocean of happiness and the essence of the Vedas.
Daras paras te paap mite, Shrikrishna pran aadhar.
Your sight and touch erase sins; you are the life-foundation of Lord Krishna.
Yamuna pavan vimal sujas, bhakti sakal ras khani.
Yamuna, your fame is pure and sacred; you are the mine of all devotional essences.
Shesh Mahesh vadan karat, mahima na jay bakhani.
Even Shesh and Mahesh (Shiva) praise you; your glory cannot be fully described.
Pujit surasur Mukund priya, sevahi sakal nar-nar.
Worshipped by gods and demons, you are the beloved of Mukund, served by all men and women.
Prakati mukti hetu jag, sevahi utrahi paar.
You appeared in this world for salvation; those who serve you cross the ocean of life.
Bandi charan kar jori kaho, suniyo matu pukar.
With folded hands at your feet, I say, please listen to my plea, Mother.
Bhakti charan chitt deyi ke, kijai bhav te paar.
Grant me devotion at your feet and guide me across the ocean of worldly existence.

|| Chaupai ||
Jai jai jai Yamuna maharani.
Victory, victory, victory to Queen Yamuna.
Jaya Kalindi Krishna patarani.
Victory to Kalindi, the queen of Krishna.
Rupa anup shobha chhavi nyari.
Your form is matchless, and your beauty is unique.
Madhav-priya Braj shobha bhari.
You are the beloved of Madhav and the great beauty of Braj.
Bhuvan basi ghor tap kinha.
You performed severe penance in the world.
Purna manorath Murari kinha.
And Lord Murari fulfilled all your desires.
Nija ardhangi tumhi apnayo.
You accepted Him as your life-partner.
Sanvaro Shyam pati priya payo.
You found your beloved, the dark-complexioned Lord Shyam.
Rupa alaukik adbhut jyoti.
Your form is supernatural, a wonderful light.
Neer renu damkat jyun moti.
Your water and sand shine like pearls.
Suryasuta shyamal sab anga.
Daughter of the Sun, with a dark complexion on all your limbs.
Kotichandra dhyuti kanti abhanga.
You possess the unfading radiance of millions of moons.
Aashray Brajadhishwar linha.
You took the shelter of the Lord of Braj.
Gokul basi shuchi bhaktan kinha.
And you purified the devotees living in Gokul.
Krishna Nand ghar Gokul ayo.
When Krishna came to Nand's home in Gokul.
Charan vandi kari darshan payo.
He bowed at your feet and received your vision.
Solah shringar bhuj kankan sohe.
Adorned with sixteen decorations, bracelets on your arms.
Koti kaam lajahi mann mohen.
Millions of Cupids feel ashamed before your beauty; your mind is charming.
Krishnavesh nath moti rajat.
You look royal with the pearl nose ring of Krishna's dress.
Nupur ghungharu charan mein bajat.
The bells on your feet resound.
Mani manak mukta chhavi niki.
The beauty of your jewels and pearls is exquisite.
Mohani rupa sab upma fiki.
Your form is enchanting; all other comparisons seem dull.
Mand chalahi priya-pritam pyari.
You walk slowly with your Beloved.
Rijhahi Shyam priya priya nihari.
Shyam feels delighted seeing you, his beloved.
Mohan bas kari hriday virajat.
You reside in the heart of Mohan.
Binu pritam kshan chain na pavat.
Without you, He feels restless for even a moment.
Muralidhar jab murali bajavain.
When the flute-player plays His flute.
Sang keli kari anand pavain.
He finds joy in playing with you.
Mor hans kokil nit khelat.
Peacocks, swans, and cuckoos play around you daily.
Jalkhag kujat mridubani bolat.
The water birds sing in soft, sweet tones.
Ja par kripa drishti barsavain.
Upon whom you cast your graceful glance.
Prem ko bhed sohi jan pavain.
Only that devotee understands the secret of love.
Naam Yamuna jab mukh pe avain.
When the name 'Yamuna' comes to one's lips.
Sabahi amangal dekhi tari javain.
All misfortunes vanish upon seeing you.
Bhaje naam Yamuna amrit ras.
Those who chant the name Yamuna, which is like nectar.
Rahe sanvaro sada tahi bas.
The dark Lord always remains present with them.
Karunamayi sakal rasakhani.
O Compassionate One, you are the treasure of all flavors.
Sur nar muni bandahi sab gyani.
Gods, sages, and wise ones worship you.
Bhutal prakati avtar jab linha.
When you appeared on earth as an avatar.
Uddhar sabhi bhaktan ko kinho.
You liberated all your devotees.
Shesh gira shruti paar na pavat.
Neither Shesh nor the Vedas can find your limits.
Yogi jati muni dhyan lagavat.
Yogis and sages meditate upon you.
Dand pranam je achaman karahi.
Those who bow and perform your purification (achaman).
Nasahi agh bhavsindhu tarahi.
Destroy their sins and cross the ocean of life.
Bhav bhakti se neer nahavain.
Those who bathe in your water with devotion.
Dev sakal tehi bhagya saravain.
Even the gods praise their good fortune.
Kari Braj vas nirantar dhyavahi.
Those who live in Braj and constantly meditate on you.
Paramanand param pad pavahi.
Attain the supreme state of eternal bliss.
Sant munijan majjan karahi.
Saints and sages bathe in you.
Nav bhaktiras nij ur bharahi.
And fill their hearts with the nectar of nine-fold devotion.
Puja nem charan anuragi.
Those who worship your feet with dedication.
Hoi anugrah darash badbhagi.
Receive your grace and become very fortunate.
Deepdan kari arti karahi.
Those who perform your Aarti with lamps.
Antar sukh mann nirmal rahahi.
Feel inner peace and have a pure mind.
Kirti vishad vinay kari gavat.
Those who sing your glorious praises with humility.
Siddhi alaukik bhakti pavat.
Attain supernatural success and devotion.
Bade prem ShriYamuna pad gavain.
Those who sing the praises of Yamuna with great love.
Mohan sanmukh sunan ko avain.
Have the Lord Mohan come to listen.
Atur hoy sharanagat avain.
Those who come to you as a seeker in distress.
Kripakari tahi begi apnavain.
You quickly accept them with grace.
Mamatamayi sab janahi mann ki.
Compassionate Mother, you know the heart of all.
Bhav pida harahi nij jan ki.
And you remove the suffering of your people.
Sharan patipal priya kunjeshwari.
Protector of those who seek refuge, beloved Queen of the Groves.
Braj upma pritam praneshvari.
You are the glory of Braj and the life of your beloved.
Shriji Yamuna kripa jab hoi.
When the grace of Yamuna comes.
Brahma sambandh jiv ko hoi.
One attains a relationship with the Divine.
Pushtimargi nit mahima gavain.
Followers of the Pushti Marg constantly sing your glory.
Krishna charan nit bhakti dridhavain.
And strengthen their devotion to Krishna's feet.
Namo namo Shri Yamune maharani.
Salutations to Queen Yamuna.
Namo namo Shripat patarani.
Salutations to the Queen of the Lord of Fortune.
Namo namo Yamune sukh karni.
Salutations to Yamuna, the giver of happiness.
Namo namo Yamune dukh harni.
Salutations to Yamuna, the remover of sorrows.
Namo Krishnayai sakal gunakhani.
Salutations to the beloved of Krishna, the treasure of all virtues.
Shriharipriya nikunj nivasini.
Beloved of Hari, residing in the groves.
Karunamayi ab kripa kijain.
O Compassionate One, please show your grace now.
Fadkati mohi sharan me lijain.
Please accept me in your refuge.
Jo Yamuna chalisa nit gavain.
Those who recite the Yamuna Chalisa daily.
Kripa prasad te sab sukh pavain.
Receive all happiness through your grace.
Gyan bhakti dhan kirti pavahi.
They attain knowledge, devotion, wealth, and fame.
Ant samay Shridham te javahi.
And at the end of life, they reach the divine abode.

|| Doha ||
Bhaj charan chit sukh karan, haran trividh bhav traas.
Worship her feet to find peace of mind and remove the three types of worldly suffering.
Bhakti pai anand raman, kripa drishti Braj vaas.
With devotion, one finds the joy of the Lord and the grace of living in Braj.
Yamuna chalisa nit nem te, path kare mann lay.
Those who recite the Yamuna Chalisa with daily discipline and a focused mind,
Krishna charan rati bhakti dridh, bhav badha mit jay.
Strengthen their devotion to Krishna's feet and all worldly obstacles disappear.

faq.q1: What is the spiritual significance of reciting the Yamuna Chalisa?
faq.a1: Yamuna (Kalindi) is considered the beloved consort of Lord Krishna. Reciting this Chalisa invokes deep devotion and love for Lord Krishna in the heart of the devotee.
faq.q2: Does reciting the Yamuna Chalisa help in calming the mind?
faq.a2: Yes, Maa Yamuna is called 'Papnashini' (the destroyer of sins) and 'Bhakti Dayini' (the giver of devotion). Remembering her and reciting the Chalisa brings coolness, peace, and purity to the mind.
faq.q3: What is the best place to recite it?
faq.a3: If possible, reading it on the banks of the Yamuna River is considered the best. If that is not possible, reciting it at your home shrine with full devotion is equally fruitful.
faq.q4: Is there a specific day designated to read it?
faq.a4: You can recite the Yamuna Chalisa every day. It is considered especially auspicious to read it on occasions like Krishna Janmashtami, Ekadashi, and Sharad Purnima.
faq.q5: Is the Yamuna Chalisa considered a path to devotion to Krishna?
faq.a5: Absolutely. Devotees of the Braj region consider Yamuna Ji as the embodiment of pure devotion. Reciting the Yamuna Chalisa is a simple and effective way to attain the grace of Lord Krishna.
